flags.concern: timeline-placement-variants: Step 4 is underspecified against the repository's variant model. Default image edits do not create a new generation row; `complete_task` creates a new `generation_variants` row on the existing generation, so completion-time placement cannot key only on output URL plus `generation_id` without risking the wrong asset being inserted or later tracked.
flags.evidence: `supabase/functions/complete_task/generation-handlers.ts:43-98` handles source-based edits by calling `createVariant(...)` and only marks the task as `generation_created`; `supabase/functions/complete_task/generation-core.ts:197-234` inserts into `generation_variants`; timeline assets already model both `generationId` and `variantId` in `src/tools/video-editor/types/index.ts:189-197` and `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useAssetManagement.ts:246-292` persists both when placing generated media.

flags.concern: selection-identity-contract: Step 2 does not account for variant identity, but the current editor-chat attachment contract only carries `generationId`. That is not enough to preserve the exact selected source for non-primary variants, so Step 3's promised `source variant lineage` cannot be reconstructed reliably, especially for gallery selections.
flags.evidence: `src/tools/video-editor/types/agent-session.ts:9-18` and `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useAgentSession.ts:271-288` serialize attachments without any `variantId`; `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useSelectedMediaClips.ts:5-14,141-179` and `src/shared/contexts/GallerySelectionContext.tsx:18-29,72-87` only preserve `generationId`; meanwhile the task resolver contract already accepts `source_variant_id` in `supabase/functions/create-task/resolvers/zImageTurboI2I.ts:21-34,111-115`.

flags.concern: completion-target-resolution: The plan never says where completion-time placement gets the target timeline identifier. In the current repo, task creation and completion are project-scoped, not timeline-scoped, so persisting only anchor clip data is insufficient for `complete_task` to load and mutate the correct timeline when the worker finishes.
flags.evidence: `supabase/functions/complete_task/completionHelpers.ts:6-16,123-154` fetches task context with `project_id` and `params` but no `timeline_id`; `supabase/functions/complete_task/handler.ts:161-230` only passes that task context into generation creation; `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useAgentSession.ts:271-288` sends selected clips to `ai-timeline-agent`, but `rg -n "timeline_id" supabase/functions/create-task supabase/functions/complete_task supabase/functions/ai-timeline-agent/tools/create-task.ts src/shared/lib/tasks src/shared/lib/taskCreation` returns no create-task/complete-task timeline field to recover later.
